'''''Star Wars: Anakin's Speedway''''' was a game released by Lucas Learning in [[2000]]. It was intended for children ages 4 and up and featured young [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and other characters from [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].

==Publisher's summary==
''Anakin's Speedway ''challenges kids to construct and master podracing test tracks with their favorite ''Episode I'' characters such as Anakin, Sebulba, and Gasgano. Players could create thousands of tracks filled with turns, loops, jumps, and tunnels while learning the dynamics of speed and momentum.''''
